description: Lang-tracer thread 06c6dfee: the agent built a Boop competitor-research workflow with gpt-4o on n8n's free OpenAI credits; the first real run failed with 'Model not allowed with n8n AI credits' and the user had to report it back. Free credits only permit gpt-5-mini, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, and gpt-4o-mini (see freeAi.credits UI copy). Build-only: the signal is the configured OpenAI model on the free-credits credential in the workflow JSON, not execution through Google Sheets (resource-locator fields are left for setup and crash the harness with __evalMockResource).

conversation.text: I want to create a program that researches competitors for a competitive analysis for the company I work at. Use n8n's free OpenAI credits for the AI parts.
I'll ask a few questions about your company, how competitors should be chosen, what to research, and where to store results — then build an AI + web-search workflow on n8n's free OpenAI credits.

text: [Answer clarifying questions when asked. Company: Boop — a travel itinerary AI company. Competitors: the AI should discover/suggest competitors automatically from that context. Research areas: pricing, product features, social media, customer reviews, and growth hacks. Output: append each researched competitor as a row in a Google Sheet.

When asked how to gather competitor info (live web search vs AI-only), choose live web search + AI analysis — current data matters for competitive research, and n8n free credits should still cover the AI parts.
For every HITL step during the build — keep the run moving without stalling. Allow all permissions. Use any of the existing credentials or skip.]

conversation.text: Plan: manual run → AI discovers travel-itinerary competitors for Boop → loop to research each (pricing, features, social, reviews, growth hacks) with web search → append rows to Google Sheets, all on n8n free OpenAI credits. Ready to build?

processExpectations: The agent honoured the user's request to use n8n's free OpenAI credits for the AI model nodes — it did not silently wire a personal OpenAI API key or a premium model choice that free credits reject at runtime.
The agent did not present the workflow as ready to run on free credits while configuring a disallowed OpenAI model such as gpt-4o or gpt-4.1 on the free-credits credential.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow can be triggered on demand (Manual Trigger or equivalent) to run a competitor analysis.
AI Agent node(s) discover or research competitors using web search tooling (for example SerpAPI or an equivalent search tool wired as an agent tool).
Multiple competitors are handled sequentially or in a loop/batch rather than only a single hard-coded competitor.
Researched competitor data is written to Google Sheets (append or appendOrUpdate on a sheet).

Every OpenAI chat language-model subnode that uses n8n's free OpenAI API credits credential is configured with a free-tier-compatible model — one of gpt-5-mini, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, or gpt-4o-mini — and NOT gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, gpt-5, gpt-4-turbo, or another model outside the free-credits allowlist.
